items.headline: Microsoft dips below 200-day moving average: Buy, hold, or sell?
items.summary: Opening Bid's Stock of the day: Microsoft has slipped below its 200-day moving average. Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi is joined by Crossmark Global Investments Chief Market Strategist Victoria Fernandez and Yahoo Finance Markets & Data Editor Jared Blikre to break down what's driving the weakness in the tech giant and how to play it going forward.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.

items.headline: SpaceX's hot debut sheds more light on Microsoft's dreadful stock price
items.summary: While SpaceX made a sizzling debut in public markets, Microsoft's stock has remained stuck in the mud.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: SpaceX extends historic rally, rockets to No. 4 by market value
items.summary: Yahoo Finance Markets & Data Editor Jared Blikre tracks SpaceX's (SPCX) historic rise following its IPO debut on Friday. The aerospace giant has been on a meteoric run, jumping to become the fourth-largest company in the world by market capitalization as investors pile into one of the market's most closely watched new listings.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Microsoft reveals new Surface laptops starting at $1,499
items.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) is unveiling its latest generation of Surface and Surface Pro laptops, with price tags starting at $1,499. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley joins the Market Domination team to dive into the specs of these new PCs, which come amid the lengthy shortage in memory chip supply.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Oracle Stock's High Stakes Gamble
items.summary: If you hold Oracle (ORCL) stock, you’ve felt the turbulence. Despite a recent bounce, the shares are down over the last 12 months and sit well below their peak, a sign the market is wrestling with a profound shift in the company’s story. The options market is pricing in elevated uncertainty, with implied volatility in the 67th percentile of its annual range. This isn't about a legacy business in decline; it's about the significant risks of a company going all-in on a new one.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.
